Measure Word Sorting Game 🪙

Drag each sentence into the correct measure word column: 条, 双, 件. If correct, it will be sorted automatically. If wrong, you will see a hint. Earn 1 coin for each correct answer.
Coins: 0
Time Left: 03:00

How to play: You can drag a sentence card into a column, or tap a card first and then tap a column. Correct answers will be sorted automatically. Wrong answers will show a hint. Time limit: 3 minutes.

Sentence Cards

Sorting Area

条

tiáo · long / narrow things

双

shuāng · things in pairs

件

jiàn · clothing / item pieces
Great for classroom display · Works on computers, tablets, and phones
